title: Greenfield novakai rebuild — execution workplan
goal: Rebuild .mmd architecture map for the whole src/ app; prove validate+lint+gate; 0 pending items.
rules: Edit ONLY .mmd files and json files I create. No .ts/.mjs/package.json/tsconfig edits.
Read actual source before authoring each fragment. No assumptions; prove with commands.
After each meaningful task: re-read this workplan + ground against rules.
Test every claim; paste real command output as proof.
If truly stuck: estimate, document, mark pending, continue. Goal = 0 pending.
definition_of_done: extract --map: #bodies == #(%% src lines) (every src symbol resolves)
node tools/buildspec/gate.mjs -> '✓ spec and code are in sync' (exit 0)
npm run typecheck -> passes (proves no TS touched/broken)
git status --short -> only docs/novakai/*.mmd, src/**/*.novakai.mmd, public/bodies.json, workplan.json
per_fragment_checklist: 2. `%% root <containerId>` = a node defined in root.mmd (join key).
3. Every node has exactly one `%% kind` (component|hook|class|store|module|function|type|service|event).
4. Code-bound nodes carry `%% src <id> <path>#<symbol>` that resolves to a real TS symbol.
6. Interfaces (i0.name/accepts/returns) ONLY on gated kinds (class/function/hook/type); arity+return match real TS (backfill).
7. Reviewable unit decomposed to function altitude: real private/internal functions as child nodes.
8. Children grouped into purpose `subgraph` sections; `%% parent <section> <unit>` on the SECTION, never the leaf.
9. Solid `-->` call spine in real call order (acyclic); dotted `-.->` for reads/refs/returns/type-use.
10. No LOOSE-BAG (decomposed unit must have sections), no BARE-LEAF, no FLAT.
11. Cross-container edges live in root.mmd, not the fragment.

boot: main (srcless boot phases; no interfaces; gate-safe)
